project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with FastAPI dashboard
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode, Python 3.11, no Docker daemon needed
contribution_requirements: All changes must have tests, score clamping [0,10], division guards
key_patterns: Each persona in src/augur/personas/ extends BaseAgent with analyze() returning AgentResponse. Dashboard uses FastAPI+Jinja2 in dashboard/. Tests in tests/ using pytest.
directory_structure: src/augur/ = core Python package, dashboard/ = FastAPI app, personas/ = markdown persona docs, skills/ = skill yamls, tests/ = pytest tests
